title: Old Enchant Glint Plus
description: Brings back the old enchantment glint!
body:
# Old Enchant Glint Plus

![Glint Showchase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xayK2IoV/images/50a62b2724e4eaa0fde6c2dea348fe45d9930b12.png)

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/old-enchant-glint-plus)

Brings back the old enchantment glint from versions before 1.19.4, which was changed in 1.19.4 and newer.

**_Restores the classic visual charm that many players loved._**
